chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D-8257 / 2018 (Farid Rashid Gul Muhammad & Others V. Pakistan Defence Officers Housing Authority & Others) ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ Present:- Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry. Mr. Justice Muhammad Jaffer Raza. HEARING OF CASE 1) For hearing of Misc. No. 36136/2018. 2) For hearing of main case. Date of hearing: 23.10.2025 Date of announcement: 23.10.2025 Ms. Naztoosy, Advocate for Petitioners. Mr. Pervaiz Ahmed Memon, Advocate for Respondent. Mr. Zamir Ahmed, Advocate for Respondent No. 1. ___________________ Muhammad Jaffer Raza, J,. The petitioners are all joint owners of the subject property1 and through the instant petition are seeking mutation / transfer of the subject property in their names. The record reveals that the subject property has already been transferred in the names of the petitioners by the Military Estate Office and Cantonment Board Clifton. It has been submitted by the learned counsel appearing of the petitioners that the only mutation left to be issued by respondent No. 1. We have specifically asked the learned counsel appearing for respondent No. 1 if there is any impediment in processing the mutation application of the petitioners. The learned counsel in this regard has stated that there is no impediment in processing the said application subject to survey / site visit of the subject property being carried 1 Residential Plot No. 4-A/1, 7th Central Avenue, measuring 1000 square yards, situated in Phase 1, Pakistan Defence Officers Housing Authority, Karachi

We have specifically asked the learned counsel appearing for respondent No. 1 if there is any impediment in processing the mutation application of the petitioners. The learned counsel in this regard has stated that there is no impediment in processing the said application subject to survey / site visit of the subject property being carried 1 Residential Plot No. 4-A/1, 7th Central Avenue, measuring 1000 square yards, situated in Phase 1, Pakistan Defence Officers Housing Authority, Karachi 2 out. Learned counsel appearing for the petitioners has no cavil to the said proposition. The instant petition is disposed of with a direction to respondent No. 1 to carry out the survey /site visit within two weeks from today and thereafter, process the mutation / transfer application of the petitioners subject to other formalities being fulfilled by them. The instant petition is disposed of in the said terms. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
